Generated: 2026-05-08

These files are cleaned Markdown extracts from a complete authenticated Baofoo BaoCaiTong doc.mandao catalog refresh on 2026-05-08. They intentionally keep only page metadata and article content. Navigation chrome, login controls, raw HTML files, cookies, credentials, and authentication-token URLs are not stored here.

Use these extracts as source evidence only. The hot-path contract layer remains `CONTRACT_SOURCE_MATRIX.md` and `BAOCAITONG_FIELD_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md`. Pages outside the current LocalLife production scope are retained for drift detection and future design, not automatically enabled as supported product scope.
